drafts.comment:
I denne draften tar AI Rancher over Joiner og Joiner kommer rundt på 5.valg. 

Tror AI må gå vekk fra random. Eller at 2 av AI spiller e er 100% fokusert på ADP/PWR. Og den siste er 90% styrt og 10% random

combos.comment: Dyrestrategi-kombo (går ut fra at Fence Overseer er antikombo med Animal Breeder fordi du ikke fencer en unused space når det står er stall der)

drafts.comment: Etter jeg får rundt renaissance man og tower builder drafter jeg for sen bygging og mye poeng på rennaissance man. Bounty er perfekt siden jeg allerede har to occupations med bonus-symbol.

combos.comment: After playing bounty, play renaissance man to immediately get that important veggie
Getting points from renaissance man makes up for building last.
Both benefit from buying Joinery, Pottery and BMW.

drafts.comment: Ohh i wanna go to a space!
Merkelig hånd. Tror man kan få mange ulike hender/utfall.
Endte med disse fra Heidi`s challenge
Educator & Grocer betyr mye mat ut. Corncopia og Sow actions i R7&9 kan hjelpe. Ser for meg 4 rom & 1 stall, 3-5 fields. 3-4 spaces for pastures. Dekke resten med Kudzu.

combos.comment: Powder keg slightly helps with renovating to stone asap, then lighthouse and officer provides the actions you need, even from a small house
Fresh dirt worker and wood collector gives you wood early to fence, then lumberjack for more wood later on (stables or joinery)

drafts.comment: Can pretty easy get to 5 pastures, then 7 animals, then 5 rooms.

combos.comment: Fence semi early. PlayPastureland and get 2 or 3 animals. Then Studmaster.
Clay hut combo
Early sowing combo
Plow+
Get 1 food and 1 grain each time you play occupations with Circus manager
Play both improvement and occ when taking most recent action spacet
Drawing genius most likely gives you more major actions than you need, custom improvements is a nice combo
Build stables with part time builder, get crops with silo builder, and fence those stables to get big enough pastures for organic farmer

drafts.comment: Plan: Go for 5 wooden rooms, 5 fields, fence 10-12 over 4 spaces. Mind the clay economy. Prob have to reno R13 to clay and R14 to stone if possible.

combos.comment: Cowboy and mother often struggle with point ceiling, but village fool and hoarder can easily give you at least 9 points when you never build rooms

drafts.comment: Very interesting hand. 3 synergies that all complement eachother; 1: small house + reno. 2: plow fields, crops, sow. 3: WildBoar eating or animal holding

Tror denne hånden kan få det gøy ved å være litt på action kort som: sau / major / fence / sow og da få 3. valgfrie fra Surv som vil trigge 2 ressurser fra Res.seller. Å gå på alternative spaces som fence er spesielt bra da Farmer + Handmaid leder til ny FG

combos.comment: Wares Salesman med Bark.Bread: Få +1 reed & 2f for en minor. Håpe at neste spiller også spiller kortet
Plow fields early, then play field doctor with evening prayer
Master tanner is very good for 2 room plan, go for well early to get cattle for master tanner
Early reno for 3 clay rooms with remodeler
Cheaper homework with 2 less reed required
Get 2 cattle and feed with dove hunter from stage 2 onwards
Majors!
Veggies for Food. 1+1 veggie for net 8 Food in the next round!
Plow maker gets you to 4 fields very fast, which allows for boatswain to help bargaining harvester
Grain elevator usually gives lots of grain for grain seller
Hill farmer gives early food, pasture planner helps a lot with south pole explorer.
Master cook gives you lots of food that makes up for the lost actions. Use this to buy goods with sailboat constructor.

drafts.comment: Drafting minors that work with primitive man, stone carver and net fisherman works to feed early. Stone exchange for extra stone for stone carver.

combos.comment: All passing minors work well with primitive man, however executive boar requires extra support.
Secure sheep for loom with dairy crier
Building 4 stables for extra crops takes you closer to 4 fenced stables, max grain and max veggies for lord of the manor

drafts.comment:
Tror det er litt potensiale i denne hånden. Ta Master Cook hver runde i 7-8 runder. Med maten og Aquirer: Kjøpe Veggie/Grain. 

Spille occu: Stablemaster, gå for 4 sauer. Få FG, spille Carpet. Gå over til Cattle.

combos.comment: Plowing early gets you both crops and wood

drafts.comment: Ganske synergisk Field Watchman hånd. Flere «sow» måter. Tidlig Veggie. Wood support. Ser for meg; 4-5 rom. 5 fields. 3 pastures for 10w. Siste spaces betales ut av HideF

combos.comment: With Field Watchman you naturally fill your farm little by little.
Nice to get early Veggie & reed when taking 1 Grain. Also nice to have a easy minor to take SP R1 to get out FW R2

drafts.comment: Wares Salesman med «svake» Basket Weaver & Stone Carver. Forventer 12-14 ressurser fra WS. Bygge 2 rom.

combos.comment: Beauty & Beast er spesielt bra kombo med Child Psych. Da maten fra BB som oftest kommer i R1-6. Spill BB i R1. Prøv å bruk BB sin effekt i R1-6. Spill ChPs i R4.
Joiner gives lots of wood, this can be used to feed
